title: Report on the proposed subsidy to FlyDoncaster Limited by City of Doncaster Council
body: "The Subsidy Advice Unit (SAU) has published its report providing advice to City of Doncaster Council concerning the proposed subsidy to FlyDoncaster Limited.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of the council’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to FlyDoncaster Limited by the City of Doncaster Council "
